description: Interzoid provides cloud-based data quality, matching, standardization, and enrichment tools and APIs. Its products help applications and data workflows identify duplicates, standardize records, validate inputs, and append structured external data.
summary: Interzoid exposes HTTP APIs for single-call data quality/enrichment and batch file matching, plus a hosted MCP server; all use the same Interzoid API license key, and the HTTP APIs also support x402 pay-per-call access without an Interzoid-issued credential.

surfaces.name: Interzoid Data Quality and Enrichment APIs
